description.value: Price 7,800 gp; Slot ring; CL 5th; Weight â; Aura faint conjuration DESCRIPTION This is ring carved from a single piece of cherry wood. If the wearer can cast summon nature’s ally spells, the wearer adds shikigami to the 3rd-level list of monsters he can summon with those spells, adds kodama to the 5th-level list, adds zuishin to the 7th-level list, and adds toshigami to the 9th-level list. Also, once per day on command the wearer can use this ring to summon a shikigami, as if by the summon nature’s ally III spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 3,900 gp; Feats Forge Ring; Spells commune with nature, summon nature’s ally III
